name: Almost Fat Free Pie Crust
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Pumpkin/apple pie spice, all spice, or cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch pie pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Make your pie filling and set aside.
4. In a cup, combine sugar with the spice mixture.
5. Stack phyllo sheets, then cut in half to make 8 sheets.
6. Cover with a tea towel until ready to use.
7. Place one sheet of phyllo on the pie pan and spray with nonstick cooking spray.
8. Sprinkle with 1/2 tsp of the sugar mixture.
9. Repeat steps with remaining phyllo sheets, fanning them evenly until the entire pie pan rim is covered.
10. Pour the pie filling into the shell and trim excess dough.
11. To prevent crust edges from burning, cover loosely with aluminum foil.
12. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F.
13. Reduce temperature to 350°F (if your recipe calls for it).
14. Bake for the necessary time (for pumpkin pie, bake an additional 40-50 minutes at 350°F).
15. Allow the pie to cool before slicing.
